title: Classic Beijing
summary: Forbidden City → Hutongs → Temple of Heaven. The essential first-timer route, manageable on foot and subway.

title: History Deep Dive
summary: Add a Great Wall day trip (Mutianyu), Summer Palace, and National Museum to the Classic route.

title: Food & Culture
summary: Focus on hutong neighbourhoods, Wangfujing night market, 798 Art Zone, and street food trails.
